title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report — AIAgent_05_2026
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 13 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 90.4%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 92.3%, and average score is 7.88/10. Total training hours are 188 and scaled cost is 9.6. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training course 'AI Agent & LLM Application Development' has been completed with a total of 13 trainees. The overall attendance rate is 90.4%, with a completion rate of 100% and a pass rate of 92.3%. The average score achieved by trainees is 7.88 out of 10, indicating a generally positive reception of the course content. However, the overall effectiveness classification is marked as 'Risk', suggesting areas for improvement despite the high completion and attendance rates.
insights: AI Agent & LLM Application Development has the strongest effectiveness score (89.47) in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainee(s) meet the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
1 course group(s) contain learners who need support based on score or attendance policy.
1 high-priority L&D NORM flag(s) were triggered.
The course achieved a high completion rate of 100%, indicating that all enrolled trainees finished the training.
The average score of 7.88/10 reflects a solid understanding of the material, although it is below the threshold for a higher effectiveness classification.
The feedback rating of 4.73/5 suggests that trainees found the course content and delivery to be satisfactory.
Despite the positive metrics, the effectiveness classification as 'Risk' indicates that there are underlying issues that need to be addressed, particularly concerning individual trainee performance.
recommendations: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources
Create a coaching plan for support-needed learners and review attendance issues with direct managers.
Implement targeted 1:1 coaching for trainees identified as needing additional support, particularly those who did not meet the pass threshold.
Consider reviewing course content and delivery methods to enhance engagement and understanding, especially for those who performed below expectations.
Monitor attendance patterns closely and provide reminders or incentives for trainees who may be at risk of lower attendance in future courses.
Explore opportunities for additional practice resources or buddy systems to support trainees who may struggle with the material.

checklist.detail: Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sheets were mapped to simulated sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count × total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one assessment/pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID, trainee ID, period
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the catalog.

normFlags.action: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources

supportNeededTrainees.reason: Below pass threshold or attendance below 70%

supportNeededGroups.reason: At least one learner is below pass threshold or attendance policy.
